executives.name: Robert Routs
executives.background: Robert Routs is the former Executive Director of Downstream Operations at Royal Dutch Shell plc. He has extensive global experience in the energy sector.

board_of_directors.name: Charles Holliday, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman of Royal Dutch Shell plc and former Chairman and CEO of DuPont.
